name: DNA Ligation (T4 Ligase)

components.name: Linearized vector
components.note: 去磷酸化可降低自连背景

components.name: Insert DNA
components.note: 摩尔比 vector:insert = 1:3–1:5 (粘性末端) 或 1:5–1:10 (平末端)

components.name: 10× T4 Ligase Buffer
components.note: 含 ATP, 勿反复冻融

components.name: 2a. 粘性末端：室温 10 min 或 16°C 过夜
2b. 平末端：16°C 过夜（或室温 2 h 用高浓度酶）
4. 转化 2–5 µL 连接产物

notes.en: Controls: (1) no ligase → assess background; (2) no insert → assess vector self-ligation; (3) uncut vector → assess transformation efficiency. Insert calculation: ng insert = (ng vector × insert bp / vector bp) × molar ratio. Quick Ligation Kit (NEB) completes in 5 min.
notes.zh: 对照组：(1) 无连接酶对照 → 评估自连背景; (2) 无 insert 对照 → 评估载体自连; (3) 未切 vector 对照 → 评估转化效率。Insert 计算公式：ng insert = (ng vector × insert bp / vector bp) × molar ratio。Quick Ligation Kit (NEB) 可 5 min 完成。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning; NEB T4 DNA Ligase protocol

materials.name: Insert DNA (purified PCR product or restriction fragment)

usage.en: Ligate DNA insert into linearized vector using T4 DNA ligase.
usage.zh: T4 DNA 连接酶将 DNA 插入片段连接到线性化载体中。

briefSteps.en: Calculate insert mass for 1:3–5 molar ratio, assemble vector + insert + T4 buffer + ligase on ice, incubate (sticky ends: RT 10 min or 16°C overnight; blunt ends: 16°C overnight), heat-inactivate at 65°C 10 min, then transform 2–5 µL.
briefSteps.zh: 计算 1:3–5 摩尔比所需 insert 用量，冰上配制 vector + insert + T4 buffer + 连接酶，孵育（粘性末端：室温 10 min 或 16°C 过夜；平末端：16°C 过夜），65°C 热灭活 10 min，转化 2–5 µL。

detailedSteps.en: Calculate insert mass needed: ng insert = (ng vector × insert bp / vector bp) × molar ratio. Use a 1:3–1:5 molar ratio (vector:insert) for sticky-end ligation, or 1:5–1:10 for blunt-end ligation. Typical reaction uses 50 ng linearized vector.
detailedSteps.zh: 计算所需 insert 质量：ng insert =（ng vector × insert bp / vector bp）× 摩尔比。粘性末端连接使用 1:3–1:5 摩尔比（vector:insert），平末端连接使用 1:5–1:10。典型反应使用 50 ng 线性化载体。

detailedSteps.en: Assemble ligation reaction on ice (20 µL total): 2 µL 10× T4 Ligase Buffer (contains ATP — do not freeze-thaw repeatedly), insert DNA, vector DNA (50 ng), 1 µL T4 DNA Ligase (400 U NEB), and nuclease-free water to 20 µL. Add ligase last.
detailedSteps.zh: 冰上配制连接反应（总体积 20 µL）：2 µL 10× T4 连接酶 buffer（含 ATP——勿反复冻融）、insert DNA、载体 DNA（50 ng）、1 µL T4 DNA 连接酶（NEB 400 U）、无核酸酶水补至 20 µL。最后加入连接酶。

detailedSteps.en: Set up control reactions in parallel: (1) vector only + ligase (checks vector self-ligation background), (2) vector + insert without ligase (checks non-enzymatic ligation).
detailedSteps.zh: 同时设对照反应：（1）仅载体 + 连接酶（检测载体自连背景），（2）载体 + insert 但不加连接酶（检测非酶促连接）。

detailedSteps.en: For sticky-end ligation: incubate at room temperature for 10 min, or at 16°C overnight for maximum efficiency. For blunt-end ligation: incubate at 16°C overnight (or room temperature 2 hours with high-concentration ligase).
detailedSteps.zh: 粘性末端连接：室温孵育 10 min，或 16°C 过夜以获最佳效率。平末端连接：16°C 过夜（或使用高浓度连接酶时室温 2 小时）。

detailedSteps.en: Heat-inactivate the ligase at 65°C for 10 min. Allow reaction to cool to room temperature before transformation.
detailedSteps.zh: 65°C 热灭活连接酶 10 min。冷却至室温后再进行转化。

detailedSteps.en: Transform 2–5 µL of ligation product into 25–50 µL competent E. coli by heat-shock (42°C 30 s). Recover in 950 µL SOC at 37°C for 1 hour. Plate on selective LB agar.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 2–5 µL 连接产物转化至 25–50 µL 感受态大肠杆菌（42°C 热激 30 s）。在 950 µL SOC 中 37°C 恢复 1 小时，涂布含抗生素 LB 平板。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate plates at 37°C overnight. Count colonies. Compare test plates to control plates. Screen colonies by colony PCR or diagnostic restriction digest. Confirm positive clones by Sanger sequencing.
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C 过夜培育。计数菌落，与对照平板比较。用菌落 PCR 或诊断性酶切筛选菌落，Sanger 测序确认阳性克隆。

note.en: Ligation product can be stored at −20°C for up to 1 week before transformation.
note.zh: 连接产物可在 −20°C 保存最多 1 周再进行转化。
